rules.condition_select: PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?zone ?setpoint ?delta WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "OccupantSetpointRequest" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone ; <urn:prop:delta> ?delta . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:currentSetpoint ?setpoint . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?zone ?setpoint ?cap WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "DemandResponsePeak" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone ; <urn:prop:cap> ?cap . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:currentSetpoint ?setpoint . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?zone ?mode WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "CO2Spike" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone ; <urn:prop:mode> ?mode . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:ventilationMode ?currentMode . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?zone ?setpoint WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "OccupancyDetected" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:currentSetpoint ?setpoint ; ex:occupied false . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?zone ?state WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "EmergencyAlarm" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone ; <urn:prop:state> ?state . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:emergencyState ?currentState . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?zone WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "EmergencyAlarm" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:ventilationMode ?currentMode . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?zone ?setpoint ?target WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "PreheatRequest" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone ; <urn:prop:target> ?target . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:currentSetpoint ?setpoint . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?zone WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "DemandResponsePeak" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:ventilationMode ?mode . } }
